title: MC II pro
description: A quality of live modpack that tries to capture that Actions And Stuff like feel while adding more cool mechancs and structres.
body:
**This modpack makes minecraft better in ways that you didn't even know about.**

Did you ever wanted to be able to enhance your game but keep the vanilla feel?
Than This is what you need. A modpack that compacks a bunch of QOF mod, adds some new structures and some cool machanics that you didn't even think of your self.


<details>
<summary>Can I play this on non modded servers?</summary>
Yes as long you turn off all non client mods: Anvilcrushing Recepies, Avil Too Expensiv Fix,  Default Arms, Double Doors, all the: More . . . Variants and Respect My Trims. Most of these don't actually coase any problems as they just do not work.


</details>

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 ###   **Features**
- 3d working benches en other things.
- 3d plants fowers and revamped crops.
- Being able to see what mods you have instald and costomize the settings for mods.
- Lots and lots of particels and effects to make ur game better in so many ways.
- More directional sounds for everthing.
- Sounds for biomes and weather events.
- Better weather, for exaple: wind thunder clouds during storm.
- Better animations for tools and entities.
- Being able to see ur own body in first person.
- Culling for particels and entities to inprove ur game play.
- And lots more!

<details>
<summary>What's new?</summary>

Banner Flags anebles the player to place a banner sideways so that it actualy looks like a flag.
AnbientSounds a mod that gives biomes ther own respective and uniek sound to realy sell that globall vibe thats usally missing. 
Cut Through makes it ezeyer to atack mobs through grass/cane/tall fowers widhout breaking them. 
Better Boats a resource pack that improves the desing from the boat to more acurate.

</details>

____________________________________________________________________________________
<details>
<summary>Can I add my own content?</summary>
Yes like any other this modpack is fuly customizable. You do have to look at the compadibility of the mod if it actualy makes big changes to the game, or it involves things on the same subject as the mods already added. With resource packs there is usualy no problem at all. And of course you can always turn on or of any mod/resource/datapack as you like.

</details>

### Some of the main includet mods 
1. EMF
2. ETF
3. Anvil Crushing Recipes
4. Better Clouds
5. Better Third Person
6. Chat Heads
7. Dynamic Crosshair 
8. Entity Culling
9. Explorify
10. FerriteCore
11. Hold My Items
12. Mod Menu
13. Model Gap Fix
14. t/m 28. More- barrel, beehive, bookshelves, cartography, chiseld-bookshelf, composer, crafting, fletching, grindstone, juke/noteblock, lectern, loom, smithing and smoker- variants. 
29. Not Enough Animations
30. Particle Rain
31. Particalar Reforged [tured off by default]
32. Skin shuffle
33. Sodium 
34. Subtle Effects


<details>
<summary>How abaut shaders?</summary>
Solas Shader are already intergraded in to the modpack but are turned off by default. Of course you can always add your onw shader to the game using Iris Shaders.


</details>


<details>
<summary>Upcomming!</summary>
Perception a mod that creates trails behind projectals to realy give that Actions And Stuff vibe to the game, this mod is currently not avelable vor 1.21.5 jet. 
Distant Horison a mod that can turn your renderdistanse way higher than vanilla without making your game lag. Couldron Expansion a mod that brings all the bedrock fungtions of couldrons to java, this mod is currently not available for Fabric but im working on that.
More i don 't realy know jet I just kinda browse to see what I can find or add

</details>





**Importand!**

This modpack is **not** supported by mojang.
And I do **not** own any of these mods.
